title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Giants, Unknown person #9, Usopp as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really wanna see red hair that bad, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well, I guess I can understand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You regret that you were just a kid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't come all this way to take in a brat like you.

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: These Dragers move like trained warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA! There's plenty of ghosts too!! How Childish!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seriously pulled a blade on a kid?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good thing these things are just how the kids imagined them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they'd be tougher to beat if they were familiar with the real versions, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the last thing we need! Gyaha ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just as I thought, there's more now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: voices that strange can't be suppressed.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If Elbaf is no longer safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Use the water from the sea clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that going to work?! The flames are massive!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
